meta.role: Lead UX Designer — end-to-end ownership from capability definition to trust architecture
meta.team: Product Manager · Engineering lead · Data science · Legal / Compliance

title:
Designing AI that surfaces what analysts
didn't know to ask for
description: I led the end-to-end UX design of an AI feature that reads a contact Directory schema, infers the business domain, and proactively suggests computed fields — while also building formulas from natural language. I shaped the capability architecture, trust model, RBAC design, and sensitive-data policy across PM, engineering, data science, and legal.
ndaNote: Employer and product details anonymised at their request. Full context available under mutual NDA.
